HGSS.1511.0000:
My name is Mr. Game!\f
My heart pounds with excitement when
people enjoy my Coin game!\f
In fact, that’s what I live for!
You look like quite a challenger!\f
Why don’t you play my Coin game?\r
You can get fabulous prizes if you
manage to collect a lot of Coins. [0200,0000]
HGSS.1511.0003:
All right!
Here is your Coin Case!\f
HGSS.1511.0004:
Show me how you play and make
my heart pound with excitement!\f
HGSS.1511.0005:
Playing my Coin game will make your
heart and my heart both pound with\r
excitement, you know?
HGSS.1511.0006:
My name is Mr. Game!\f
My heart pounds with excitement when
people enjoy my Coin game!\f
In fact, that’s what I live for!
Go ahead and play it!\r
Make my heart pound with excitement!
HGSS.1511.0007:
Go ahead and play my Coin game!
Make my heart pound with excitement!
HGSS.1511.0008:
What a feeling!
Nothing beats Coin-game spectatorship!\f
Oh! I almost forgot!\f
You can go to the building next door
and exchange your Coins for prizes.
HGSS.1511.0009:
Did you come back to play
my Coin game?
HGSS.1511.0010:
It seems you need a Coin Case
to play...\f
HGSS.1511.0011:
Mr. Game: Aha!
You must be here to play my Coin game!\f
Come here and I’ll give you a Coin Case!
HGSS.1511.0012:
Mr. Game: Show me how you play and
make my heart pound with excitement!\f
HGSS.1511.0013:
Mr. Game: Huh?\f
Why don’t you sit across from me
and show me how you play?
HGSS.1511.0014:
Yo, legend in the making!
Do you play this Coin game, too?\f
I’ve been trying for the prize Pokémon,
but that’s a tough game to beat!
